case_title: DOUGLAS MCNIE VS. JANELLE LUMSDEN LOEVNER ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$65.00) SERVED NOV-10-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LOEVNER, JANELLE LUMSDEN
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCNIE, DOUGLAS DBA MCGREGOR COMMUNICATIONS CSCL#655364
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-11-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-11-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DOUGLAS MCNIE BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF DEC-11-2008 AT 8:30AM.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-11-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCNIE, DOUGLAS DBA MCGREGOR COMMUNICATIONS CSCL#655364 RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOEVNER, JANELLE LUMSDEN $3,730.00 PRINCIPAL, $140.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,870.00, DEFENDANTS SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF: MCGREGOR COMMUNICATIONS: $3730.00, PLUS $140.00 COSTS. THE COURT NOTES THAT PLAINTIFF IS AN LLC WHICH IS LIMITED TO A MAXIMUM RECOVERY OF $5000.00. THE COURT AMENDS THE PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM TO ADD MCGREGOR COMMUNICATIONS, LLC AS A PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF DOUGLAS MCNIE IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS A PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY MCNIE, DOUGLAS DBA MCGREGOR COMMUNICATIONS CSCL#655364 AS TO DEFENDANT LOEVNER, JANELLE LUMSDEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-11-2008 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SC-108: REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER RECEIVED AND FILED. COPY OF THE SAME WITH ANSWER SHEET MAILED TO DEFTS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCNIE, DOUGLAS DBA MCGREGOR COMMUNICATIONS CSCL#655364 AS TO DEFENDANT LOEVNER, JANELLE LUMSDEN
"ANSWER" TO SC-108: REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT RECEIVED AND FILED. FILED BY DEFENDANT LOEVNER, KIRK AS TO PLAINTIFF MCNIE, DOUGLAS DBA MCGREGOR COMMUNICATIONS CSCL#655364

ORDER ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT DATED MARCH 20, 2009. "THE PREVIOUS AMENDMENT OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS VACATED. THE NAMED PLAINTIFF FOR PURPOSES OF JUDGMENT SHALL BE DOUGLAS MCNIE DBA MCGREGOR COMMUNICATIONS. THE REMAINING PROVISIONS OF THE JUDGMENT REMAIN UNCHANGED," PER COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. COPIES MAILED TO PARTIES.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LOEVNER, JANELLE LUMSDEN
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
